_comment: Phase 6.2 — a permission boundary NARROWER than the identity policy. It permits only S3 read. Simulate ec2:StartInstances with this as the boundary (PermissionsBoundaryPolicyInputList) and the identity policy above as the identity policy: the identity policy allows it, but it falls OUTSIDE the boundary, so EvalDecision = implicitDeny. Demonstrates that effective permissions are the INTERSECTION of policy and boundary; a boundary grants nothing, it only caps.
